hotel_name: Express by M Village Điện Biên Phủ Q3, a brand of Modern Village Lifestyle

reviews.title: Thái độ nhân viên rất tệ
reviews.text:
Mình đã ở M village nhiều home khác nhau nhưng trải nghiệm 2 đêm ở Điện Biên Phủ cực kỳ tệ.

- Phòng không chuẩn bị sẵn bàn chải, phải gọi người mang lên.
- Dọn phòng không kỹ, có nhúm tóc đen dưới sàn
- Khăn ở đây dùng loại thuốc tẩy gì mà mùi rất là hôi
- và điều làm mình thất vọng nhất là thái độ nhân viên. Bạn nhân viên nữ có đeo khuyên ở mũi có thái độ rất láo. Sáng thấy mình đi ra ngoài bạn chạy lại, kiểu “ủa chị trả phòng hả”. Nói chuyện với khách mà “ủa”. Mình vẫn lịch sự trả lời, “chị ra ngoài thôi em”. Tới khi mình quay về, bạn này thấy khách cũng không chào, không tươi cười vui vẻ gì cả mà mặt láo láo không đếm xỉa. Lúc mình check out, thái độ của bạn cũng không nhiệt tình gì. Mình trả lại thẻ phòng nên không mở cửa được. Bạn này cũng không chủ động ra mở cửa cho khách. Khi mình nhờ thì thái độ ra quẹt 1 cái rồi ngoe nguẩy quay vô.
Tóm lại là tại sao có thể có 1 nhân viên quá tệ và láo như vậy. Mình cực kỳ thất vọng.
reviews.response:
M Village xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn M Village là nơi lưu trú trong thời gian vừa qua. M Village rất tiếc khi chưa thể mang đến bạn trải nghiệm hài lòng nhất. 

Qua những phản hồi và góp ý của chị, M Village hiểu rằng chất lượng vệ sinh và dịch vụ tại M Village cần phải được lưu ý và cải thiện hơn. Sau khi nhận được thông tin chị cung cấp, chúng tôi đã xử lý thông tin nội bộ với nhân viên liên quan, cũng như hướng dẫn lại nhân viên lưu ý hơn về nghiệp vụ chăm sóc khách hàng. Đối với vấn đề vệ sinh, chúng tôi sẽ kiểm tra và kiểm soát chất lượng vệ sinh kỹ lương hơn. 

Một lần nữa, M Village chân thành xin lỗi đến chị về trải nghiệm không tốt vừa qua. M Village rất hy vọng có thêm cơ hội lần nữa được chào đón chị tại các chi nhánh khác của M Village.

Trân trọng 
Bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng M Village.

reviews.title: Very noisy hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is next to a bar that obviously has often live groups playing. This was the case when I was there. And the music was loud! Having video meeting in the evening was really difficult because of the noise you could not escape. The noise continued past midnight. I also woke up to my hotel room neighbors tumbling into the hotel (obviously back from the bar) around 2 am.
reviews.response:
Dear Kari,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely apologize for the noise disturbance you encountered during your stay. Being located in a lively area, nearby bars and late-night activity can occasionally affect sound levels, and we understand how this can be especially inconvenient for business travelers needing a quiet environment for rest or meetings.

Your feedback is very important to us, and we will continue looking into solutions to improve sound insulation and guest comfort. We truly regret that this impacted your stay and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a more comfortable experience in the future, perhaps in one of our quieter room options.

Kind regards,
M Village Team

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: Bathroom not clean. Bed very uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Good Enough, but Noisy and Basic
reviews.text:
Overall, it was a decent stay and good enough for a short trip. The setup is quite bare bones, so don’t expect much beyond the essentials.

The biggest issue was noise. The road outside gets a lot of heavy truck traffic at night, so it can be quite loud. Definitely bring earplugs if you plan to stay here.

The bathroom also had a problem with drainage. The floor is uneven, so water collects in one corner and doesn’t drain properly, even hours after showering.

I’d rate it around three stars overall.
reviews.response:
Dear Dan,

M Village sincerely thanks you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us.

We are glad to know that your stay was overall comfortable and suitable for your short trip. At the same time, we truly appreciate your honest comments regarding the noise from the surrounding area and the bathroom drainage issue.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the outside traffic noise and the water drainage condition in the bathroom. Your feedback regarding the floor design and overall room experience is very valuable to us, and we will share it with the relevant teams for further review and improvement.

Thank you once again for choosing M Village and for your constructive feedback. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a more seamless and comfortable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Customer Service M Village

reviews.title: So-so.

reviews.text: I booked a room with window 10days before check in, however the staff said only rooms without window were available when I checked in. The hotel prepared a room at the hotel at the other location. I could not stay at this hotel. I don't understand why this kind of mistake happened.

The Customer Service well received information. Once, M Village would like to apologize for any inconvenience this might have caused you and thank you for your understanding.

reviews.title: Good enough in a good location
reviews.positives: Good location, friendly staff, laundry facility, water refills, good linens and towels
reviews.negatives: No window!! Wet bathroom. No window!

reviews.title: Good room, couldn't sleep there
reviews.text:
The room was as described and it was clean. There is a communal room with washing machines and dryers which I was attracted to, but are usually in use it seems by staff so hard to get access to.

I am not usually one too bothered by noise so was not concerned by the busy street but this place has a venue with music right underneath it.  It sounded like the singer was in my room.  I had booked the room for the week but ended up sleeping at the Novotel around the corner, that is how bad it was.  

They also turned off power to the lift while I was in it.  Notice of the power off was given, but it was dated the next day.  Even when notice has been given correctly, it is one lift wouldn't you check it before turning power off? 

I have never before encountered anything quite like it and hope never to again.
reviews.response:
Dear Linda,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. While we are glad to know that you found the room clean and as described, we are truly sorry for the serious inconveniences you experienced during your stay. Please accept our sincere apologies for the noise disturbance from the nearby venue and for the issue you faced with the lift power outage. We fully understand how disruptive and distressing this must have been, especially as you had booked to stay for the week.

Your comments are extremely valuable to us, and we will be working with our team and partners to address both the facility and communication issues you have raised. We deeply regret that your experience fell so far short of expectations and hope you might consider giving us another opportunity in the future to provide you with a more comfortable and worry-free stay.

Customer service of M Village

reviews.negatives: I think the bathroom could have been a bit better. I think there was a plumbing issue and the toilet in the room my parents stayed in kind of smelled off, hopefully it was just a one time thing as the room me and my sister stayed in was great!

reviews.text: Mình từng lưu trú ở nhiều MVillage trước đó: Tú Xương, Đông Du, Lý Chính Thắng, NKKN... tuy nhiên cá nhân mình thấy phòng ở Điện Biên Phủ khá ồn, dọn dẹp không cọ cốc cho mình, và không gian cảm giác bí bách hơn vì các phòng san sát nhau, đồng thời bước vào phòng là chỉ ở trong phòng, không cảm giác có tính kết nối hay cộng đồng trong thiết kế. Mình book phòng ở các nơi khác thường thì nhân viên sẽ chủ động nhắn tin cho mình khi tới lưu trú. Nhưng tại đây, dù m tới vào buổi tối, nhưng nguyên cả ngày không ai hỏi gì cả. Mình tới nơi, không có NV trực nên phải đợi 1 lúc, và mình phải tự tìm số để gọi... Btw là mình không thích không gian ở BĐP cho lăm.

reviews.title: Décevant
reviews.positives: La chambre double deluxe. C’est la seule qui est agréable
reviews.negatives:
Les salle de bain avec toilette, douche et lavabo tout en un, dans un carré de 3’x6’. 

La suite avec balcon ne vaut pas la peine, elle n’est pas privé car même étage que la cuisinette et la salle de lavage et le personnel se tiennent sur cet étage. 

Le studio aussi a le meme problème de salle de bain.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotel is in a great location in district 3. We had a city view room which is spacious.  However, I was surprised that there is no TV, only tooth brushes, no tea or coffee in the room. The room has a kitchen area which is good if you  use it.  Overall it's a 3 star hotel as it is listed.  Staff were helpful.  For a 1-2 night stay, I will be happy to return.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our convenient location in District 3, as well as the spacious city view room and the helpful service from our team. It is always encouraging to know that our guests have had a comfortable stay.

At the same time, we appreciate your comments regarding the in-room amenities. Our rooms are designed with a minimalist concept, and certain facilities such as tea and coffee are available at the shared area for guests to enjoy. Your feedback is very valuable to us as we continue to review and improve the guest experience.

Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us. We are glad to know you would consider returning for another short stay, and we look forward to welcoming you back in the future.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village Team

reviews.title: Bon rapport QP
reviews.positives: Personnel souriant et disponible. Installations recentes et propres. Salle commune agréable. Café et commerces au pied de l'établissement.
reviews.negatives: Literie de qualité inégale mais bon rapport qualité prix.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: A nice location in District 3, convenient to go around explore the city,  near touriatbattractions. The lift is quite slow and small. If you stay in floor 6, superior room, has to walk and climb 2 stairs, not so convenient. We stay 2 persons but the hotel only give us 1 key. To enter or exit the main entrance door, need this key, so it is quite inconvenient to give just 1 key. The staff is not always at the counter table to help open the door. Staffs are friendly, warm and helpful. The hotel stay in a small alley, the car cant come in, so have to walk about 3 mins to the main road to wait. The road very crowded and the car not allowed to stop and wait for customers, so you have to rush jump in the car.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're delighted that you found our location convenient and appreciated our friendly and helpful staff.

Regarding your concerns, our hotel follows a different operational model compared to traditional hotels. Instead of having staff at a fixed reception desk, our team is always available upon request. When guests check in or need assistance, they can simply contact us, and we will be there promptly to help.

We understand that certain aspects, such as key access and the staircases, may have caused some inconvenience, and we truly appreciate your insights. Your feedback helps us refine our services to enhance the guest experience. Should you choose to stay with us again, we’ll do our best to make your visit even more comfortable.

Best regards,
Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tres bon service et le personel est agréable

reviews.title: 0 sound proof and beside in on renovation from 8am to 4pm
reviews.text:
0 sound proof and the window is facing directly to street plus renovation is going on everyday even on weekends

I took a 5days trip staying there and can’t get enough sleep for a single time due to the noise and renovation whole day long 

Is a disaster and nightmare to sleep there even the room was looking clean and new 

Is definitely achievable for sound proof on the window to reduce the noise but hell the window is like not able to defend any single of noises coming in
reviews.response:
Dear Darren,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us.

We sincerely apologize for the noise disturbance you encountered during your stay. We understand how important rest and sleep are, especially during a multi-day trip, and we truly regret that the street noise and nearby renovation works affected your comfort throughout your stay.

While our rooms are designed to be clean and modern, we acknowledge your feedback regarding soundproofing, particularly for street-facing rooms. Your comments have been shared with our management team for serious consideration as we continuously look for ways to improve our facilities and guest experience.

We are also very sorry for the inconvenience caused by renovation activities during your stay, including on weekends. This is certainly not the experience we wish to provide our guests.

Thank you again for your honest feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a quieter room

reviews.title: Simple et parfait.
reviews.positives:
L’accueil a été parfait du début à la fin de notre séjour. Tout le personnel a été attentif à nos moindre besoins et comme toujours aux philippines, le sourire était au rendez vous ! 

L’emplacement est parfait que vous soyez motorisés ou dépendants des taxis. 

Accès libre à une machine à laver, une cuisine, un espace détente, inclus. Ce qui fut un plus pour nous.
reviews.negatives: Le quartier ne permet pas de trouver des restaurants ouverts la nuit. Mais nous avons commandé sur Grab.

reviews.title: Excellent Customer Support
reviews.text:
The Ground Floor Re-Construction kept me awake, so I requested to be moved. 
Customer Sales Support Jenny did her utmost to make sure my wishes for a nice room werefulfilled. After a second change, I was happy. Her motto, she wrote, is: “Guests come in happy, and they leave even happier.” 
Good customer care!
reviews.response:
Dear Roman,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely appreciate your patience during the ground floor re-construction and are glad that our Customer Sales Support colleague, Jenny, was able to assist you promptly and ensure your comfort.

Your kind words truly reflect the service spirit we strive for, and reducing your feedback motivates our team to continue delivering attentive and thoughtful care. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for an even more seamless stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village Team

reviews.title: 安くて快適に泊まれる！

他の方の口コミに外のカフェの音がうるさいとありましたが、私達の部屋は全く聞こえず夜もぐっすり眠れました！洗濯機が使えるのでとても助かりました！
中心地から少し離れていますが、grabタクシーも問題なく捕まるので、観光への不便も感じなかったです。
reviews.negatives:
中心地から少し離れているため、メコンデルタ1日ツアーに参加した際にはバスがピックアップしてくれるエリアに該当せず。
でもgrabタクシーで15分程度でトラベルオフィスまで行けるので、苦ではありませんでした。

reviews.title: Noisy and dingy
reviews.text: I like the M Village concept. The staff are fantastic. The common areas are cute, but the room itself is really lacking. Most obviously a TV and a telephone. Badly in need of an update. I stayed for a week on a terrible mattress with sheets that felt like sandpaper. I asked for a quiet room and I swear they gave me the noisiest room they had on a busy 4 lane  street across from a bar that blared loud music every evening.  Location was good with lots of cute cafés around and a park nearby.
reviews.response:
Dear Nigel,

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. We truly appreciate your kind words about our team and the M Village concept, as well as your compliments on the common areas and surrounding neighborhood.

We sincerely apologize that your room experience did not meet expectations, particularly regarding the mattress comfort, bedding quality, room facilities, and the noise disturbance during your stay. We understand how important rest and quiet are, especially during a longer stay, and we’re very sorry that this was not delivered despite your request for a quiet room.

We truly regret that this stay did not reflect the standard of comfort we aim to provide. Should you consider giving us another opportunity in the future, we would be grateful for the chance to offer a more suitable room and a significantly improved experience.

Kind regards,
Customer servic of M Village Team

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Yên tĩnh, vị trí thuận tiện
reviews.negatives: Cách bố trí nhà vệ sinh không hợp lý. Bồn cầu sát cạnh lavabo. Chỗ thoát nước nhà tắm gần cửa ra vào nên sàn nhà luôn ướt.

reviews.title: One night is nice.
reviews.text:
It was good. Especially on the first floor, it was nice to order fruit delivery with my family in spaces like the laundry room and lounge, and the bedding was clean. 

The only downside is that the counter staff wasn't always present, which was disappointing. Other than that, the value for money is excellent.

reviews.title: good location and value for money
reviews.text:
Location
Excellent location—very close to most places I needed to go. I ended up walking everywhere without realizing how central it was.

Access
The hotel is down a small alley about 30m from the main road. It can be inconvenient with heavy luggage, as taxis have to stop on the busy main road.
My late arrival and early departure worked in my favor, so this wasn’t a major issue for me.


Room
Spacious room with enough space to unpack and repack large suitcases.

No TV in the room. Not a deal breaker for me, but it would have been nice to have one.

Overall
Comfortable stay with a great location, especially if you’re traveling light or don’t mind walking.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed review with us.

We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed our excellent central location and found it convenient to walk to many places. While our position slightly inside an alley may present some inconvenience for guests with heavy luggage, we appreciate your understanding and are glad it did not significantly impact your stay.

It’s also great to know that you found the room spacious and comfortable for your travel needs. Your comment regarding the absence of a TV has been noted and will be considered for future improvements.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to welcome you back for another pleasant stay.

Warm regards,
Customer service of M Village

Air-conditioning broke down on my 3rd day. Informed the staff on my way out and by the time I got back, it was fixed. But the next morning it broke again. 

It's pretty noisy given that it's in a commercial area with cafes and restaurants. One morning at 8am I was woken up by sounds of loud drumming right outside my room. It continued on for 2 hours. 

For the price, I don't have any real complaint. Spent most of my time out and about anyway, so I didn't miss not having a pool or a gym and other facilities etc. Thanks for the lovely service!
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Great place to stay.
reviews.text:
Pros: I’ve been there for one day. There was a set of chair and desk, so I asked whether they could give us another chair, and the staff delivered the extra one to our room immediately. The cabinet next to the door could also be used as another desk, which was very convenient since we both needed to study/work. The location was great, in a short alley with two exits, and there were many coffee shops nearby, especially Workflow - a pretty nice and quiet place to focus. The room was very clean, and the arrangement was quite good; I liked the avocado vibe in the room. The kitchen and washing machine were on the first floor, great and clean, and there was a notice for supplies.

Cons: However, at night, it was so noisy (from the street, the trucks, and people yelling or something), I could barely sleep; the place should add some soundproof walls. After a long trip, I was planning to have a great sleep to regenerate but couldn't due to the noise. Yet sometimes I couldn't see the staff downstairs, but it was still great. There was a window, but the view was blocked by some houses. And the brush, OMG, it was like a weapon; I thought it was smooth at first until I put it in my mouth; it stabbed my gum, and it started to bleed. Thankfully, I had my own brush.
reviews.response:
Dear ChiaYi,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay with us.

We’re truly happy to hear that you appreciated our location, room cleanliness, layout, and especially our team’s prompt support. It’s also great to know that the shared kitchen and laundry facilities, as well as the surrounding cafés, contributed positively to your experience.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you encountered. We understand how disappointing it must have been to experience noise at night after a long trip, and we truly appreciate your feedback regarding soundproofing. This is something we are aware of and continuously looking into for improvement. We also regret the discomfort caused by the toothbrush provided — this is certainly not the experience we want our guests to have, and we will review this with our housekeeping team immediately.

Thank you again for staying with us and for sharing both the positives and areas for improvem

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Great location and value for money! The area has plenty of food options, especially vegetarian spots — which was perfect since my partner and I don’t eat beef.

The room was spacious, but there were a few downsides. The aircon wasn’t very strong — even after setting it to 16°C and using the fan provided, it still felt quite warm 🥲. The room also wasn’t very soundproof. We stayed over the weekend and there’s a bar downstairs, so it got pretty noisy at night, even though we were on level 5.

The blinds didn’t block out the sunlight well either, so we ended up using random items in the room to hold them down and block the light — sun rises at around 6am 🥲

There’s a WhatsApp hotline, which was super convenient whenever we needed help.

Just a heads up: there’s no main lobby. The reception counter (which I guess serves as the lobby) is located through a side alley. If you're taking a Grab car, the driver will likely drop you off by the roadside.

They also have a common area on Level 1 where guests can cook, do laundry, and even play some card games!

We sincerely apologize for the discomfort caused by the air conditioning, noise levels from the surrounding area, and the blinds not fully blocking out sunlight. Your feedback is extremely helpful, and we’ll be working with the relevant teams to improve these areas to ensure a better rest experience for our future guests.

Thank you once again for your valuable comments. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a more seamless stay next time!

Customer service of M Village

reviews.title: Chăm sóc khách hàng & dịch vụ rất tệ
reviews.text:
1.	Mình đặt phòng lúc 11 giờ tối, nhưng khi đến nơi thì không có nhân viên trực để hỗ trợ check-in. Sau khi gọi lên tổng đài, mình được cung cấp số của chi nhánh. Tuy nhiên, phải khoảng 10 phút sau mới có nhân viên chạy xe máy về khách sạn để hỗ trợ. Tổng cộng mình phải chờ hơn 20 phút mới hoàn tất check-in.
	2.	Trong quá trình làm thủ tục, bạn mình quên mang CMND và chỉ có ảnh chụp. Mình có nhờ khách sạn hỗ trợ vì bạn mình không mang theo ví, nhưng lễ tân từ chối và nói phải tuân theo quy định. Tuy nhiên, thay vì hướng dẫn cách xử lý (ví dụ như quay về lấy giấy tờ), nhân viên lại nói trường hợp này có thể được hoàn tiền, nên mình quyết định chuyển sang khách sạn khác. Đến hôm sau, khi liên hệ lại, bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng lại từ chối hoàn tiền và viện dẫn các chính sách khác. Mỗi bộ phận hướng dẫn một kiểu, thiếu sự thống nhất và không rõ ràng trong trách nhiệm.
	3.	Khi mình phản ánh lại toàn bộ sự việc, phía khách sạn còn hỏi mình có nhớ chính xác nhân viên nào đã tư vấn như vậy không, trong khi hoàn toàn có thể kiểm tra lại camera. Điều này thể hiện sự thiếu trách nhiệm trong việc xử lý vấn đề.

Bản thân mình đã từng lưu trú tại nhiều chi nhánh M Village, nhưng đây là lần đầu tiên mình cảm thấy thất vọng như vậy và sẽ không quay lại nữa.
reviews.response:
Thân chào quý khách, 

Cảm ơn anh đã dành thời gian chia sẻ chi tiết về trải nghiệm của mình. M Village thực sự rất tiếc khi biết rằng lần lưu trú này đã mang lại nhiều bất tiện và chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của mình.

Trước hết, M Village xin chân thành xin lỗi về sự chậm trễ trong việc hỗ trợ check-in khi anh đến vào buổi tối. M Village hoàn toàn hiểu sự bất tiện khi anh phải chờ đợi, và đây không phải là trải nghiệm mà M Village mong muốn mang đến.

Liên quan đến vấn đề giấy tờ tùy thân, theo quy định lưu trú hiện hành, tất cả khách nhận phòng cần cung cấp giấy tờ tùy thân bản cứng (CMND/CCCD/hộ chiếu) để hoàn tất thủ tục đăng ký lưu trú. Chúng tôi rất tiếc nếu cách truyền đạt của nhân viên tại thời điểm đó chưa đủ rõ ràng hoặc chưa đưa ra được hướng dẫn cụ thể để anh có thể xử lý tình huống thuận tiện hơn.

Đồng thời, M Village cũng xin lỗi về sự thiếu nhất quán trong thông tin tư vấn giữa các bộ phận, đặc biệt liên quan đến chính sách hoàn tiền. M Village ghi nhận và sẽ rà soát lại

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Tôi book phòng cho con trai qua Agoda vào ngày 6.1 để con đi dự liên hoan với bạn
12H đêm về nhận phòng thì ks từ chối nhận với lý do con tôi ko có cccd và vned . Mặc dù con xuất trình cccd bản chụp và nói là sáng mai mẹ sẽ mang cccd qua.
Tôi gọi lên tổng đài cckh của ks thì chỉ nhận đc lời xin thông cảm...bla bla
Thế phòng đã book, tiền đã thanh toán mà từ chối cho nhận phòng để thằng bé nửa đêm phải đi kiếm ks khác . Rồi lỡ có gì thì ai sẽ là người chịu trách nhiệm ???
Tôi hỏi các em là nếu xuất trình cccd thì có phải là bên em sẽ chụp hình  rồi trả lại cho khách hàng có phải không? Thế thì có khác gì việc em chụp lại hình trên đt? Và nếu buộc phải thế thì sáng mai chị sẽ mang cccd tới . Em ko trả lời được, chỉ bảo là quy định của ks trên webside đã ghi rõ.
Dạ thưa với quý ngài lãnh đạo, ai đi đặt phòng mà rảnh lên đọc quy định của quý ngài mà quý ngài bảo .
Chưa bao giờ đánh giá 1 * cho ai nhưng thưa với cách làm ăn của quý ngài thế này thì có 0* tôi cũng cho

Chúng tôi đặt phòng phút cuối, và đã liên hệ với ks, nhưng khi đến nơi Nhân viên cố ý lừa đảo, bảo hết phòng, hệ thống lỗi, để chúng tôi hủy đơn trên agoda và đặt phòng trực tiếp với mức giá cao hơn.
12h đêm nhưng vẫn cố gắng để hủy đơn phòng này của chúng tôi nhằm tránh phải chi trả hoa hồng cho agoda. Đến khi tôi làm căng thì lúc đó mới ok, đưa phòng, khiến chúng tôi phải bực tức và chờ đợi hơn 1 tiếng đồng hồ. 
Đây là 1 thủ đoạn không hề xa lạ của các chủ khách sạn, khôn lõi. Trong khi chúng tôi ở xa đên, vừa đói vừa mệt, lại đến vào giờ khuya, cố ý làm khó, nếu nhẹ dạ cả tin sẽ nghe theo và bị ăn thêm 1 khoản tiền
Khách sạn ghi có chỗ đổ xe, nhưng đến nơi thì không có, phải mang đi gởi cách vài trăm m với chi phí cắt cổ

reviews.title: 糟糕的經驗
reviews.text:
當時抵達飯店約22:15
大廳沒有任何人，在等待約5分鐘看到飯店人員騎機車回來，依正常流程check in後，依飯店人員給的房號204 房卡進入不了房門，再返回大廳又不見人影，打了電話後才有另一位女員工從內部房間出現重新設定房卡房號爲202？！所以是剛剛設定錯誤？！再來更無語了 ，順利進去房間後，準備洗澡，沒！有！水！，再次打電話詢問，第一位員工出現說因為水塔設備從21:00壞掉預計要要到隔天上午5:00才能有水，詢問我們能不能接受？當然接受不了啊！checkin 的時候早就知道設備損壞沒有水卻什麼說明都沒有還要等我們進去房間發現才說明，到底是什麼意思！！約莫再等了30分鐘才說明會幫我們換到另一間M village!
最終我們到另一間進入到房間已將近00:30…
房間風格很好、地點很棒，但人員處理能力爛透了！
reviews.response:
M Village are sorry to learn that your experience on this occasion did not meet your expectations. It is certainly not the impression we want to leave you with. Your feedback is valuable and will help us to improve our operations, and we are going to take steps to ensure that this situation does not repeat itself.

Once, M Village would like to apologize for any inconvenience this might have caused you and thank you for your understanding. We really do hope for another chance that we will be able to welcome you at M Village.

Best regards,
Customer Service M Village

reviews.title: MVillage é sempre boa escolha no Vietnam
reviews.text:
Escolhemos esse local após ter conhecido outro hotel da mesma rede, porém as comodidades do quarto e a localização não eram tão boas nessa sede. 
O check-in foi ótimo, com atendimento rápido e preciso pelos funcionários.
A localização fica a aproximadamente dois kilometros dos principais pontos de interesse em Saigon, mas é bem próxima de bares, restaurantes e mercados.
As áreas comuns oferecem cozinha coletiva e máquinas de lavar e secar roupas, o que é muito conveniente.
